title: refactor(gen-text): drop redundant Azure config re-parsing (lower-risk subset only)
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Remove unused `resourceName` param from createAzureModelConfig; resource name now always derived from the endpoint URL (no caller ever passed it).
- Update the lone Llama-4-Maverick call site to drop the `undefined` positional and pass `{ requiresBase64ImageUrls: true }` as the now-4th overrides arg.
- Delete the `DEFAULT_AZURE_API_VERSION` const and `process.env.OPENAI_API_VERSION` fallbacks in extractAzureApiVersion; inline a single default (unreachable since every Azure URL carries ?api-version=...).
- Simplify extractAzureResourceName: drop the never-true `=== 'undefined'` guard, keep the 'pollinations' no-match fallback.

Risks:
- extractAzureApiVersion no longer honors the OPENAI_API_VERSION env var. No gen-worker code sets or reads it, and every configured Azure URL includes ?api-version=, so the override was already dead — pure behavior-equivalent for all current models.
- URL remains the source of truth for deployment names (gpt-5-nano-2025-08-07 -> gpt-5-nano, gpt-audio-mini-2025-12-15 -> gpt-audio-mini); signature intentionally NOT rewritten to region+deployment to avoid re-deriving these.

Deferred (out of scope / premise changed):
- FINDING 1 full signature rewrite to (region, deploymentName, apiVersion) — Explicitly rejected by the proposal as out-of-scope/too risky. The URL must remain the source of truth because registry 

_~17 net lines removed · biome ✓ · cd gen.pollinations.ai && npx vitest run test/text/genericOpenAIClient.test.ts test/error- ✓_

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the Azure configs
gist.blurb: Swept away some unused parameters and dead code in our Azure model configurations. Just keeping the hive tidy!
gist.summary: Refactored Azure model configuration parsing in the text generation worker by removing the unused resourceName parameter and dead OPENAI_API_VERSION environment variable fallbacks.
gist.impact: This is a purely internal codebase cleanup that simplifies the Azure provider logic without changing any existing model behavior or endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing or cleaning up a server room or configuration files. A broom or duster. Cloud/server motifs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up dusty old code blocks in a glowing server room. A chunky retro monitor displays clean, organized folders. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes.
